# GLYPH Engine

> Replayable exact-byte evidence layer for fixed corpora.

GLYPH is an experimental engineering project for deterministic exact-byte retrieval and replayable evidence artifacts over fixed corpora. It is not a general search engine, SIEM, malware scanner, legal proof system, or vector/RAG product.

## Current verified checkpoint
- Live site: https://glyph.rs
- Repository: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine
- Review tag: `rlbwt-bounded-evidence-v1`
- One-command verifier: `./verify.sh`
- Expected verifier result: `[tiny-fixture] PASS` and `VERIFY OK`

## Current strongest claim
GLYPH has a reproducible review checkpoint for replayable exact-byte bounded evidence over fixed sentinel-safe corpora.

## Verified evidence chain
The current verified RLBWT bounded evidence path demonstrates:
1. Fixed corpus identity by hash and manifest.
2. Exact query bytes and query hash.
3. Exact FM interval.
4. Exact match count.
5. Bounded deterministic offsets using `max_offsets`.
6. Direct byte verification for returned offsets.
7. Evidence artifact creation.
8. Artifact replay verification.
9. Portable bundle creation and replay verification.
10. Schema smoke validation through the one-command verifier.

## Current technical state
- Current verified path: RLBWT bounded evidence over sentinel-safe fixed corpora.
- Artifact version: `RLBWT_BOUNDED_EVIDENCE_V1`
- Bundle version: `RLBWT_BOUNDED_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE_V1`
- Runtime profile: `RLBWT_FULL_RUNTIME_PROFILE_V1`
- Current binary-safe production runtime: not claimed.
- Binary-safe reference work: documented boundary, virtual sentinel design, symbol corpus prototype, and FM tiny reference fixture.

## Important boundaries
GLYPH currently does not claim:
- production binary-safe indexing
- arbitrary malware/RAM dump support
- distributed or petabyte-scale deployment
- timestamped evidence
- signed or notarized evidence
- court-grade legal proof
- source authenticity beyond recorded hashes
- exhaustive locate when `bounded=true`
- semantic search
- fuzzy search
- token search
- ranking

## Key files for reviewers
- Current technical state: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/review/GLYPH_CURRENT_TECHNICAL_STATE_V1.md
- RLBWT bounded evidence review path: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/review/RLBWT_BOUNDED_EVIDENCE_REVIEW_PATH_V1.md
- RLBWT bounded evidence spec: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/specs/RLBWT_BOUNDED_EVIDENCE_SPEC_V1.md
- RLBWT bounded evidence bundle spec: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/specs/RLBWT_BOUNDED_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE_SPEC_V1.md
- Binary-safe design decision: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/specs/BINARY_SAFE_DESIGN_DECISION_V1.md
- AI discovery files report: https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine/blob/main/docs/review/GLYPH_AI_DISCOVERY_FILES_V1.md

## Run
```bash
git clone https://github.com/yasha1971-coder/glyph-engine.git
cd glyph-engine
git checkout rlbwt-bounded-evidence-v1
./verify.sh

```
